User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the application with role-based access control.

role.description: Role determining access to specific dashboards.

department.description: The sector or department staff belongs to.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

Claim.title: Claim
Claim.description: Represents a post-tour travel expense claim.

claimNumber.description: Unique auto-incremented tracking number with prefix e.g., KRPLTR01.

employeeUid.description: Firebase UID of the employee who submitted the claim.

employeePhone.description: Verified phone number of the employee.

tourStartDate.description: Start date of the official tour.

tourEndDate.description: End date of the official tour.

advanceAmount.description: Cash advance given before start of tour.

totalExpenseAmount.description: Sum of all individual line item expenses.

finalBalance.description: Total Expenses Entered - Advance Amount Paid.

narration.description: General description or notes about the overall tour.

rejectionReason.description: Written reason by the Auditor Admin if the claim is rejected.

customCategories.description: Custom expense variables added by Super Admin.

categoryRights.description: Mapping from custom category to list of departments that can see/use it.

nextSerial.description: The next value for auto-increment Claim serial number.

/users/{userId}.description: Store individual accounts and their core authorization details.

/claims/{claimId}.description: Store tour travel expense claims along with workflow state.

/settings/global.description: Global customization variables, permission rights, and increments tracker.
